custom_features.description: Defines the custom SSL features to enable for the SSL policy; only applicable if the policy profile is set to CUSTOM.

description.description: Defines the description of the SSL policy, providing context or details about its purpose or configuration.

min_tls_version.description: Specifies the minimum TLS version that the SSL policy will support; must be one of `TLS_1_0`, `TLS_1_1`, `TLS_1_2`, or `TLS_1_3`.

name.description: Unique name for the SSL policy, adhering to Google Cloud naming conventions (1-63 characters, lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens).

profile.description: Specifies the SSL profile to use, which determines the set of SSL features and ciphers; options include COMPATIBLE, MODERN, RESTRICTED, or CUSTOM.

timeouts.description: Defines the timeout duration for create, update, and delete operations on the SSL policy.
